analysis_summary: Complete analysis of all 33 ceramic test tiles fired in Cone 10 reduction at Default Studio studio.
key_observations: Reduction atmosphere effects confirmed: carbon trapping in shinos, oil spots in tenmoku variants
Celadon development shows proper iron reduction (Fe2+ green)
Chun Blue demonstrates Rayleigh scattering from micro-bubbles
Application thickness effects clearly visible: pooling darker in recesses, breaking at edges
technical_insights: Tea dust crystals identified as iron-silicate formations
Strontium crystal magic shows active dendritic crystal growth
Copper reds show typical reduction behavior with possible edge re-oxidation
Oil spot formation confirmed in Tenmoku, Angel Eyes, and Oilspot Blue/Green
